purpose: Preserve how project language evolved into explicit decision boundaries so future teams do not collapse implementation, verification, deployment, runtime outcome, and peer triggering into one success claim.

included: abstract project terminology and decision rules

evolution_records.observed_meaning: Source code, workflow logic, schema, test, or gate exists in a repository commit.
evolution_records.decision_boundary: Implementation evidence may support code-exists, but cannot by itself support deployed, executed, audible, resolving, or accepted.

sources.supports: Do not report implementation without evidence.
Committed gates coexist with unresolved deployment or runtime outcomes.

evolution_records.supersedes: Earlier loose usage in which a committed mechanism could be narrated as if the external outcome had already occurred.
evolution_records.review_route: Require immutable source commit and inspect the exact changed artifact.

evolution_records.observed_meaning: A named verifier executed a defined check and retained its result, inputs, version, invocation, evidence location, uncertainty, and falsification route.
evolution_records.decision_boundary: A verified check is scoped to that check; it is not universal proof of the underlying project claim.

sources.supports: Introduced an auditable verification receipt contract.

evolution_records.inferred_implication: Future summaries should name the verifier and checked proposition instead of using verified as an unqualified project-wide status.
evolution_records.review_route: Fetch the verification receipt schema, validator, raw evidence reference, and exact artifact digest.

evolution_records.observed_meaning: A provider returned or served a reachable deployment whose runtime identity is bound to an immutable source commit.
evolution_records.decision_boundary: A deployment workflow, configuration file, or deployment gate is not deployment proof.

sources.supports: Cloudflare and Vercel deployment outcomes remain explicitly unverified despite committed deployment mechanisms.
Implementation and deployment-not-proven are coexistence, not contradiction.

unresolved: Cloudflare resolving URL and served identity
Vercel deployment identity for the relevant audio commit or descendant
evolution_records.review_route: Retain provider deployment output, reachable URL, served runtime identity, and matching immutable source commit.

evolution_records.observed_meaning: The target environment produced a measured behavior during a defined observation interval.
evolution_records.decision_boundary: A runtime probe or diagnostic control existing in source does not establish that a user device produced the intended result.

sources.supports: V-001 requires phone retest or runtime meter in addition to source and deployment identity.
A committed live-identity gate coexists with an unresolved audible-phone outcome.

evolution_records.review_route: Bind device, observation time, deployed identity, runtime measurements, and reported outcome in one retained evidence packet.

evolution_records.observed_meaning: A direct trigger or schedule mutation was accepted by the available tool.
evolution_records.decision_boundary: A trigger attempt or successful reschedule does not prove that the peer team executed or completed work.

sources.supports: Defines durable trigger requests when direct peer triggering is unavailable.
Teams leave evidence plus a trigger request for peers.

evolution_records.review_route: Inspect tool acknowledgement or durable trigger-request record; require separate peer output or commit before claiming execution.

resolved.resolution: Different evidence layers coexist and are not contradictory.

resolved.apparent_conflict: peer trigger accepted versus peer not yet run
resolved.resolution: Scheduling evidence and execution evidence are distinct propositions.

unresolved: Whether current provider deployments match the latest source commits
Whether iPhone Safari produced audible output for the deployed audio slice

verification.method: JSON structural review plus source SHA and commit cross-check
verification.acceptance: Every term has a scoped meaning, decision boundary, claim state, evidence strength, provenance, and review route.
